title: Hira Hira
description: Add a touch to the cherry blossom petal particles. Make them flutter and rotate as they fall.
body:
# What is this?
Hira Hira is a small mod that slightly modifies the movement of the cherry blossom petal particles. They will now fall while fluttering and spinning.

![Falling patals gif](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Zemelua/Hira-Hira/main/src/main/resources/materials/falling_patals.gif)
